title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other models locally with a single CLI or REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same features as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models for chat, embeddings and tool-calling.

title: ollama-webui (now Open WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama with chat history, RAG, user auth and plugin system.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous & async APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST endpoints; supports streaming chat.

title: ollama-cli (rich TUI)
summary: Terminal-UI wrapper around Ollama with fuzzy model search, chat history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline code copilots with autocomplete and explain.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) setups.

title: ollama-chatbot (Next.js)
summary: Minimal Next.js chatbot template that streams Ollama responses with Tailwind UI.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: PDF Q&A, voice chat, function-calling, RAG, fine-tune LoRA adapters.

title: ollama-model-librarian
summary: CLI tool to scan Hugging Face and auto-convert/import models into Ollama Modelfile format.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth, rate-limit and usage logs to Ollama API.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to Ollama REST endpoints.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM summaries, Q&A and brainstorming inside your vault.
